game_name: Fire Emblem: Genealogy of the Holy War

sub_pixel_system.notes: Not documented for this tactical RPG

special_mechanics.name: Movement Range System
special_mechanics.description: Units have displayed movement ranges based on character class during turn-based tactical gameplay

physics_values.weapon_type_effect: axes reduce movement more than swords; affects weight mechanics

special_mechanics.name: Weapon Triangle
special_mechanics.description: Rock-paper-scissors system governing weapon effectiveness (lances > swords > axes > lances)

special_mechanics.name: Leadership Stat Boost
special_mechanics.description: High-ranking units grant stat bonuses to all units within 3 tiles

tier_notes: Tier 2 - This is a tactical RPG with turn-based grid movement, not a real-time action game. Movement physics are not numerically documented. Character movement is class-determined with range displays, not continuous physics-based motion. No jump, gravity, or acceleration mechanics applicable.
sources_used: Wikipedia - Fire Emblem: Genealogy of the Holy War
